description: The screen transitions to a dark background, preparing to display task instructions.
Task instructions begin to appear on the screen, starting with 'Perfect! Here's your task...'
The task instructions continue to populate, detailing the scenario of booking a domestic flight in Australia.
Additional instructions are displayed, asking the user to think out loud during the process.
The final part of the task instructions is revealed on the screen.
The task instructions disappear, and the browser's bookmarks bar becomes visible again.
